headline: Crude Oil Surges 4%; Travelers Posts Upbeat Q2 results
summary: Nasdaq falls over 200 points, Dow down 0.28%, S&P 500 drops 0.51%. Energy shares up 1.4%, communication services stocks down 3.1%. Travelers Companies beats Q2 estimates. Southland Holdings up 51%, Sadot Group up 44%, Callan JMB up 41% on news. Intuitive Surgical down 11%, Laser Photonics down 20%, Regenxbio down 15%.
